0. 9m and onshore at Molhe Leste; might be good practice for swimming.
🌊 Swell: 0.9m @ 10s 💨 Wind: 6.0km/h NW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 12.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 0.9m @ 10s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
At barely a meter, with that onshore breeze, you'll mostly be fighting foam today.
🌊 Swell: 0.9m @ 10s 💨 Wind: 6.0km/h NW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 12.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 0.9m @ 10s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
A 0.9m swell with onshore wind? Might be good for a swim.
🌊 Swell: 0.9m @ 10s 💨 Wind: 6.0km/h NW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 12.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 0.9m @ 10s ONSHORE

programme.title: 🌊 0.9m @ 10s CROSS
programme.desc:
With a sub-meter swell and a crosswind, today's Baleal Norte looks like a good day for walking the dog.
🌊 Swell: 0.9m @ 10s 💨 Wind: 6.0km/h NW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 12.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 0.9m @ 10s CROSS
programme.desc:
With that swell period, those 0.9m waves might just be rideable, depending on your desperation level.
🌊 Swell: 0.9m @ 10s 💨 Wind: 6.0km/h NW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 12.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 1.1m @ 9s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
The 1.1m swell with this wind suggests more churning white water than rideable face today.
🌊 Swell: 1.1m @ 9s 💨 Wind: 9.0km/h WNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 20.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 1.1m @ 9s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
The 1.1m swell with this wind suggests more churning white water than rideable face today.

programme.title: 🌊 1.0m @ 9s CROSS
programme.desc:
Those 1.0m lumps might offer a ride or two before the wind ruins them completely.
🌊 Swell: 1.0m @ 9s 💨 Wind: 11.0km/h WNW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 23.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 1.0m @ 9s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With a one-meter swell and that wind, expect a bumpy ride into Vila do Conde.
🌊 Swell: 1.0m @ 9s 💨 Wind: 11.0km/h WNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 23.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 1.0m @ 9s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With a meter of swell and onshore breeze, it's probably more productive to watch the seabirds faceplant.
🌊 Swell: 1.0m @ 9s 💨 Wind: 11.0km/h WNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 23.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 1.0m @ 9s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 1.0m @ 9s 💨 Wind: 11.0km/h WNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 23.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 1.0m @ 9s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 1.0m @ 9s CROSS
programme.desc:
Those 1.0m waves and onshore breeze suggest a battle against the closeouts, not a bodyboarding session.
🌊 Swell: 1.0m @ 9s 💨 Wind: 11.0km/h WNW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 23.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m
